mission: Give Buddy a friendly, device-ready opportunity encyclopedia for personal life, business life, and work life so clients can find legitimate money, savings, jobs, funding, contracts, benefits, and productivity paths with clear approval and evidence gates.

friend_copilot.promise: Make hard tasks feel like talking to a trusted friend who shows the steps, explains risks, and keeps proof visible.

resource_lanes.label: Jobs And Careers
resource_lanes.purpose: Help clients find jobs, improve resumes, match qualifications, track applications, and prepare interview packets.

resource_lanes.label: Side Hustles
resource_lanes.purpose: Find realistic side-income paths, starter checklists, price tests, marketplace fit, and risk notes.

resource_lanes.label: Contracts Grants Procurement
resource_lanes.purpose: Find contracts, grants, RFPs, vendor registrations, procurement paths, and bid-readiness requirements.

resource_lanes.label: Investors Loans Credit
resource_lanes.purpose: Help clients prepare investor lists, loan readiness, grant alternatives, credit-building plans, and home-loan preparation.

resource_lanes.label: Unclaimed Money And Estates
resource_lanes.purpose: Help clients search official public unclaimed property, probate, estate, genealogy, and beneficiary research paths.

resource_lanes.label: Settlements And Claims
resource_lanes.purpose: Track public settlement and claims notices weekly and help users identify possible eligibility without creating false claims.

resource_lanes.label: Associations And Networks
resource_lanes.purpose: Maintain association, chamber, trade group, union, incubator, accelerator, mentor, alumni, and professional network resources for every bot category.

resource_lanes.label: Treasure And Asset Research
resource_lanes.purpose: Help clients organize lawful research into collectibles, inherited assets, mineral rights, property records, forgotten accounts, and historical records.

allowed: official court or settlement administrator pages
public lender or program requirement pages
blocked: legal financial tax or credit decisions without professional review
